_comment: Authoritative Academy Award allow-list (winners + nominees), keyed by TMDB id. Source: Wikidata (P166/P1411 -> Academy Award incl. P1686 for-work) + Wikipedia Best Original Song & Best Sound lists + app oscar_cache/draft history + 98th-ceremony seed. Absence = no Oscar.
